finding: Regenerated types.ts is BYTE-IDENTICAL to baseline/types.ui.ts (diff -q clean); jq -S openapi.json canonically-equal to baseline (236 order-only lines). No config type nor event type appears in either output, so the Config split (flatten+Deref) and the EventHandler &dyn Any erasure are provably schema-neutral.

ServerConfig groups postgresql/server/logging/jwt; ziee Config flattens it via #[serde(flatten)] so postgresql/server/jwt/logging stay top-level keys. packaging_config_tests (full-yaml parse) + the golden regen (which loads config via Config::load_from) both pass, confirming the YAML wire shape is byte-identical.

HttpServerConfig (renamed from ziee ServerConfig) body + all serde defaults (max_file_upload_mb, rate_limit, trust_forwarded_headers) copied verbatim; max_file_upload_tests moved with it and pass in ziee-core.

Config gains Deref/DerefMut -> ServerConfig. Field access (config.postgresql/.server/.jwt/.logging) and method calls (config.database_url()/server_address()) auto-deref; mutation (config.server.port=…, config.postgresql.embedded) via DerefMut in load_from/resolve_paths. No Config{…} struct-literal exists anywhere, so the new server_config field breaks no construction site. cargo check -p ziee green.

MODULE_ENTRIES distributed_slice is DEFINED in ziee-framework and registered into from ziee's 44 module sites via the crate::module_api re-export (no slice-path find/replace needed). Proven to link cross-crate: the full-router regen emitted every module's routes (canonically-equal openapi); an empty slice would have yielded a near-empty spec. The retained create_modules_instantiates_all_entries_in_order test asserts every entry is present.

EventBus retains AppEvent + all dispatch/semaphore/clone logic verbatim; emit/emit_async now coerce &AppEvent -> &(dyn Any+Send+Sync). Coercion is sound: AppEvent is already 'static+Send+Sync (required by the pre-existing emit_async tokio::spawn borrowing &event across await).

3 ziee handlers (hub/mcp/assistant) + 2 desktop handlers (llm_provider/mcp) prepend `let Some(event)=event.downcast_ref::<AppEvent>() else {return Ok(())}`; the match/if-let bodies are byte-identical. downcast_ref is available on &(dyn Any+Send+Sync) (std impls it). Value-identical for the real AppEvent path.

create_cors_layer/apply_rate_limit_layer bodies (the F-04 permissive-CORS warn + the F-15/A3 rate-limit gating incl. enabled:false opt-out) are verbatim; only the param type changed &Config->&ServerConfig (reads config.server.cors/.rate_limit, both on HttpServerConfig). ziee callers pass &config (Config) which deref-coerces. No security posture change.

ModuleContext.app_config is Arc<dyn Any+Send+Sync>; module_api::app_config downcasts to ziee Config. This is DI (not a global) and carries the same Config value modules read before. No secret/JWT is newly exposed — jwt stays on ServerConfig (ctx.config.jwt) as before; the opaque slot only holds the same Config the app already owns.

All 10 relocated config sub-types (+ServerConfig,HttpServerConfig) are re-exported from ziee-core so crate::core::config::{JwtConfig,CorsConfig,…} and ziee::{CorsConfig,JwtConfig} paths (auth/jwt.rs, file/config.rs, desktop backend) resolve unchanged. #[allow(unused_imports)] preserves the full pre-split public surface without a lint failure.

module_api/mod.rs re-exports AppModule/ModuleContext/ModuleEntry/MODULE_ENTRIES from ziee-framework, preserving the exact pre-move public surface consumed by all 44 registration sites + lib.rs (pub use ... as ServerContext) + main.rs + openapi/mod.rs.

The two module-registration tests (create_modules_instantiates_all_entries_in_order, module_names_are_unique) STAY in ziee's app_builder.rs shim (they need ziee's registered modules linked); the rate_limit_config_tests + max_file_upload_tests MOVED to ziee-core with their types (13 ziee-core tests pass). No test #[ignore]/skip added; no behavioral assertion edited.

ziee-framework deps (aide/axum/sqlx/tower-http/tower_governor/linkme/async-trait/tracing) pinned to ziee's workspace catalog versions so the single src-app/Cargo.lock unifies them (no duplicate build). cargo check --workspace (sdk) + cargo check -p ziee + cargo check -p ziee-desktop all exit 0.

ziee-desktop embeds the server crate: its ServerContext::new site (openapi.rs) + 2 EventHandler impls tracked the T-5/T-8 signature changes; config.server_config field + Deref work identically for the desktop Config consumer. cargo check -p ziee-desktop exit 0.

McpSessionManager::new needs Arc<Config>; after ModuleContext.config became Arc<ServerConfig>, the site now uses module_api::app_config(&module_context) (Arc<Config>) — value-identical to the previous module_context.config.clone().
